data.title: Investors of LifeMD between May 7, 2025 and August 5, 2025 may contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential claims.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in LifeMD during the period from May 7, 2025, to August 5, 2025, to reach out to him directly to explore their potential legal options. If you are among the investors affected during this specified time frame and wish to examine your rights regarding this issue, please consider contacting James (Josh) Wilson for further assistance.

data.title: Drawbridge Realty buys 190,000 sq ft HIVE office campus in Costa Mesa, leases 100% to Anduril Industries.
data.description: A Class A office campus located at 3333-3337 South Susan St. in Costa Mesa's Greater Airport submarket has been acquired by Drawbridge Realty. The acquisition of The HIVE spans 190,000 square feet across three buildings, with Invesco Real Estate as the previous owner. The transaction was facilitated by Eastdil Secured. Drawbridge Realty is in talks with Anduril Industries, Inc., a prominent next-generation defense technology developer, to secure a long-term lease for the entire campus.

data.title: University of Phoenix celebrates 4,361 graduates in Las Vegas with 13,374 guests. A milestone for many first-generation degree earners.
data.description: University of Phoenix recently held its autumn 2025 graduation event in Las Vegas at the Thomas & Mack Center on September 26-27. The ceremony celebrated the accomplishments of 4,361 graduates who were in attendance. With a total of 13,374 individuals present, the arena was full over the course of the two-day event. The graduates, many of whom were the trailblazers in their families in obtaining a degree, were cheered on by the crowd as they walked across the stage. The ceremony highlighted academic achievements and the perseverance and dedication exhibited by the students.

data.title: Terra Innovatum merges with GSRT, starts trading on Nasdaq. Nuclear reactors developer and SPAC finalizes deal.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, Terra Innovatum Global N.V., a company specializing in micro-modular nuclear reactors, completed its business combination with GSR III Acquisition Corp., a publicly traded special purpose acquisition company listed on Nasdaq under GSRT. The merger was finalized after receiving shareholder approval at GSRT’s Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders held on October 7, 2025. This development marks a significant milestone in the nuclear energy sector.

data.title: Lockheed Martin declares a Q4 2025 dividend of $3.45 per share, up by $0.15 (5%) from the previous quarter.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland on October 9, 2025, the board of directors of Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE: LMT) approved a dividend of $3.45 per share for the fourth quarter of 2025. This marks a $0.15 (5%) increase per share compared to the previous quarter. It also signifies the company's 23rd consecutive dividend payment.

data.title: WasabiCon in Jacksonville, FL is the largest pop culture event with a focus on anime, cosplay, and gaming; started in 2012.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida, the Green Mustard Entertainment WasabiCon, a popular pop culture convention centered around anime, cosplay, and gaming, began in 2012. Known as North Florida's biggest and most enduring event of its kind, it is held at the Prime F. Osborn III Convention Center in Downtown Jacksonville.

data.title: Ascot Resources Ltd. to list shares on TSXV NEX Board as AOT on Oct 14, 2025. TSX: AOT; OTCQB: AOTVF.
data.description: Ascot Resources Ltd. (TSX: AOT; OTCQB: AOTVF) from Vancouver, British Columbia, shared that starting October 14, 2025, their common shares will trade on the NEX Board ("NEX") of the TSX Venture Exchange ("TSXV") under the symbol AOT. This move signifies a significant development for the Company as they transition to the NEX Board.

data.title: New GB300 NVL72 supercomputing cluster launched by Microsoft Azure and NVIDIA to advance AI, positioning US as a leader in AI with groundbreaking technology.
data.description: In a groundbreaking move, Microsoft Azure has announced a partnership with NVIDIA to introduce the revolutionary GB300 NVL72 supercomputing cluster. This cutting-edge technology aims to elevate AI model development to unprecedented levels and reinforce the United States' position as a frontrunner in AI innovation. This collaboration signals a significant advancement in the tech industry, with the supercomputing cluster set to revolutionize the field with its impressive capabilities. This initiative represents a strategic alliance between two industry giants, emphasizing the importance of leveraging advanced technology to pave the way for future AI advancements.

data.title: Vinitaly.USA 2025 in Chicago attracts 2,200 trade professionals, up 47% from 2024, boosting Italian wine industry.
data.description: The recent event in Chicago has seen a notable increase in attendance, with over 2,200 trade professionals from the U.S., Canada, and Mexico, marking a substantial 47% rise from the previous year. Federico Bricolo, President of Veronafiere, hailed the event as a success for the Italian system. This gathering has played a key role in enhancing connections between Italy and the United States, fostering stronger ties in the business sector.

data.title: Bandai Namco Amusement America to launch "THE GUNDAM BASE CHICAGO" in winter 2025, first US location at Fashion Outlets of Chicago.
data.description: In Irvine, California, on October 9, 2025, Bandai Namco Amusement America announced the upcoming launch of "THE GUNDAM BASE CHICAGO" in winter 2025 at Fashion Outlets of Chicago. This store will be the first of its kind in the United States and will be situated near Chicago, Illinois. It will be the official GUNPLA store operated by BNAA, offering a wide range of Gundam model kits and merchandise for fans of the franchise.
